347 GG0170I1_WLK_10_FEET_STRT_CD GG0170I1_WLK_10_FEET_STRT_CD GG0170I1 Admission Performance Walk 10 Feet Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to walk at least 10 feet in a room, corridor or similar space at the time of admission. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to walk at least 10 feet in a room, corridor or similar space at the time of admission. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal
